creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
Wen:

I have freexl new port.

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=168131

I am suggesting the category be textproc/freexl, which will change the 
LIB_DEPENDS.


options:

1) give you pr ports/168131
2) gohead and change category to textproc/freexi and commit new port, 
(add you to Cc list and add audit to this pr)
3) leave it in databases/freexi

(I like #2)
-- 
Michael Scheidell, CTO
 >*| * SECNAP Network Security Corporation
